description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Experimental that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run a single job on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, continuing on error for experimental builds. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.10-dev, install pip, wheel, and requirements from requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt, and then run Tox with the py environment.
